title: OpenAI and Broadcom unveil LLM-optimized inference chip
summary: OpenAI and Broadcom introduce Jalapeño, a custom AI chip built for LLM inference to improve performance, efficiency, and scale across AI systems.
title_es: OpenAI y Broadcom presentan chip de inferencia optimizado para LLMs
bajada: OpenAI y Broadcom revelaron Jalapeño, un chip personalizado diseñado específicamente para inferencia de modelos de lenguaje. Esta iniciativa busca mejorar el rendimiento, eficiencia y escalabilidad de los sistemas de IA en producción.
bajada_en: OpenAI and Broadcom unveiled Jalapeño, a custom chip designed specifically for LLM inference. This initiative aims to improve performance, efficiency, and scalability of production AI systems.

title: Computer use in Gemini 3.5 Flash
title_es: Gemini 3.5 Flash incorpora capacidad de interacción con computadoras
bajada: Google ha añadido a Gemini 3.5 Flash la habilidad de usar computadoras directamente, permitiendo que el modelo interactúe con interfaces gráficas y complete tareas automatizadas. Esta característica amplía significativamente los casos de uso de los agentes de IA.
bajada_en: Google added computer interaction capabilities to Gemini 3.5 Flash, allowing the model to directly control computers and automate tasks through graphical interfaces. This feature significantly expands use cases for AI agents.

title: Anthropic says Alibaba illicitly extracted Claude AI model capabilities
title_es: Anthropic acusa a Alibaba de extracción ilícita de capacidades de Claude
bajada: Anthropic denunció que Alibaba extrajo ilícitamente capacidades del modelo Claude mediante ingeniería inversa no autorizada. La disputa plantea importantes preguntas sobre seguridad de modelos y propiedad intelectual en IA.
bajada_en: Anthropic accused Alibaba of illicitly extracting Claude's capabilities through unauthorized reverse engineering. The dispute raises important questions about model security and IP protection in AI.

title: IBM has unveiled chip technology that could help extend Moore’s Law another decade
summary: IBM has built a new prototype chip with around 100 billion transistors on an area the size of a fingernail, which is twice the density of the company’s previous state-of-the-art technology announced in 2021. The design could pave the way for faster and more energy efficient computers for years to come. For more than half…
title_es: IBM presenta chip sub-1nm que extiende la Ley de Moore una década más
bajada: IBM reveló un prototipo de chip con 100 mil millones de transistores en un área microscópica, duplicando la densidad anterior. Este avance en arquitectura de hardware es crucial para acelerar computación de IA en los próximos años.
bajada_en: IBM revealed a chip prototype with 100 billion transistors in a microscopic area, doubling previous density. This hardware architecture advance is crucial for accelerating AI computing in coming years.

title: Adobe acquires image and video enhancement tool maker Topaz Labs
summary: Adobe said that it will integrate Topaz Labs' tools across its apps.
title_es: Adobe adquiere Topaz Labs para potenciar herramientas de edición
bajada: Adobe completó la adquisición de Topaz Labs, conocida por sus herramientas de mejora de imágenes y vídeos basadas en IA. Las tecnologías se integrarán en el ecosistema de aplicaciones de Adobe para mejorar las capacidades de edición.
bajada_en: Adobe completed the acquisition of Topaz Labs, known for AI-powered image and video enhancement tools. The technologies will be integrated into Adobe's app ecosystem to enhance editing capabilities.

title: Amazon ups India bet with fresh $13B AI infrastructure investment
summary: Amazon’s latest India investment comes as global tech companies race to expand AI infrastructure in the country.
title_es: Amazon invierte 13 mil millones en infraestructura de IA en India
bajada: Amazon anunció una inversión adicional de 13 mil millones de dólares en infraestructura de IA en India, reafirmando su apuesta por el mercado indio. Esta inversión refleja la competencia global por capacidad de infraestructura de IA en mercados emergentes.
bajada_en: Amazon announced an additional $13 billion investment in AI infrastructure in India, reinforcing its commitment to the Indian market. This reflects global competition for AI infrastructure capacity in emerging markets.

title: How agents are transforming work
summary: A new OpenAI research paper shows how AI agents are transforming work, enabling longer, more complex tasks and expanding productivity across roles.
title_es: OpenAI publica investigación sobre cómo los agentes transforman el trabajo
bajada: OpenAI lanzó un paper que examina cómo los agentes de IA están cambiando la forma de trabajar, permitiendo automatizar tareas más largas y complejas. El research proporciona insights sobre el impacto de los agentes en la productividad laboral.
bajada_en: OpenAI released a research paper examining how AI agents are changing work, enabling automation of longer and more complex tasks. The research provides insights into agents' impact on labor productivity.

title: Figma now has AI motion graphics and shader tools
summary: Figma has revealed some new design and coding product updates at its annual Config conference that aim to help creatives "push their ideas further" and automate tedious tasks with AI. Part of this is a reimagined canvas that's now optimized for full-stack development, according to Figma, bringing teams, AI agents, tools, and materials "together in […]
title_es: Figma incorpora herramientas de motion graphics y shaders potenciadas por IA
bajada: Figma presentó nuevas herramientas de diseño con IA durante su conferencia Config, incluyendo animación de motion graphics y generación de shaders. La plataforma se posiciona como herramienta full-stack para desarrollo integrado con agentes de IA.
bajada_en: Figma announced new AI-powered design tools at Config, including motion graphics animation and shader generation. The platform positions itself as a full-stack tool for development integrated with AI agents.

title: aws /agent-toolkit-for-aws
summary:
Agent Toolkit for AWS Help AI coding agents build, deploy, and manage applications on AWS. The Agent Toolkit for AWS gives AI coding agents the tools, knowledge, and guardrails they need to work with AWS services. It works with the coding agents developers already use — including Claude Code, Codex, Cursor, and Kiro. Quick start Claude Code The plugins are available on the official Anthropic marketplace ( claude-plugins-official ) which is added to your Claude Code installation by default.
Use the following commands to install supported plugins from the toolkit: For aws-core that covers service selection, CDK/CloudFormation, serverless, containers, storage, observability, billing, SDK usage, and deployment: /plugin install aws-core@claude-plugins-official Tip: If you get Plugin not found , update your local marketplace index first: /plugin marketplace update claude-plugins-official For aws-agents that covers building AI agents on AWS with Amazon Bedrock and AgentCore: /plugin install aws-agents@claude-plugins-official For aws-data-analytics that covers data lake, analytics, and ETL workflows with S3 Tables, AWS Glue, and Athena: /plugin install aws-data-analytics@claude-plugins-official For aws-agents-for-devsecops used to investigate incidents, review code and execute UAT for release readiness, scan code for vulnerabilities, and run penetration tests with AWS DevOps Agent and AWS Security Agent. /plugin marketplace add aws/agent-toolkit-for-aws
/plugin install aws-agents-for-devsecops
/reload-plugins

# Or from Claude's official marketplace:
/plugin install aws-agents-for-devsecops@claude-plugins-official
/reload-plugins

# Setup:
/aws-agents-for-devsecops:setup Codex In your terminal: codex plugin marketplace add aws/agent-toolkit-for-aws Then launch Codex and run /plugins to browse and install the aws-core plugin. Cursor Add this repository as a team marketplace from Settings → Plugins → Team Marketplaces → Add Marketplace → Import from Repo , pointing it at aws/
title_es: AWS lanza Agent Toolkit para empoderar agentes de IA en la nube
bajada: AWS publicó Agent Toolkit, un conjunto de herramientas que permite a agentes de IA construir, desplegar y gestionar aplicaciones en AWS. Compatible con Claude Code, Codex y otros, facilita la integración de agentes con servicios AWS.
bajada_en: AWS released Agent Toolkit, a set of tools enabling AI agents to build, deploy, and manage applications on AWS. Compatible with Claude Code and other platforms, it simplifies agent integration with AWS services.

title: calesthio /OpenMontage
summary: OpenMontage The first open-source, agentic video production system. Paste A Video · Quick Start · Try These Prompts · Pipelines · How It Works · Providers · Review Guide · Agent Guide Follow The Build Turn your AI coding assistant into a full video production studio. Describe what you want in plain language — your agent handles research, scripting, asset generation, editing, and final composition. Important distinction: OpenMontage can make image-based videos, but it can also make a real video video for free/open-source workflows: the agent builds a corpus from free stock footage and open archives, retrieves actual motion clips, edits them into a timeline, and renders a finished piece. That is not the usual "animate a handful of stills and call it video" trick. signal-from-tomorrow_final_with_music_upload_v2.mp4 "SIGNAL FROM TOMORROW" — a cinematic sci-fi trailer fully produced through OpenMontage: concept, script, scene plan, Veo-generated motion clips, soundtrack, and Remotion composition. the_last_banana_v3_github.mp4 "THE LAST BANANA" — a 60-second Pixar-style animated short about a lonely banana who finds friendship with a kiwi. 6 Kling v3-generated motion clips (via fal.ai), Google Chirp3-HD narration, royalty-free piano music, TikTok-style word-level captions, and Remotion composition. Total cost: $1.33 . void-linkedin.mp4 "VOID — Neural Interface" — a product ad produced with just one API key (OpenAI). 4 AI-generated images (gpt-image-1), TTS narration, auto-sourced royalty-free music, word-level subtitles via WhisperX, and Remotion data visualizations. Total cost: $0.69 . Zero manual asset work. candyland.mp4 "Afternoon in Candyland" — a Ghibli-style anime animation. A little girl's whimsical afternoon adventure through candy gates, gumdrop rivers, and lollipop gardens. 12 FLUX-generated images with multi-image crossfade, cinematic camera motion (zoom, pan, Ken Burns), sparkle/petal/firefly particle overlays, and ambient music with auto-detected energy offs
title_es: OpenMontage: primer sistema abierto de producción de vídeo agéntica
bajada: Se lanzó OpenMontage, un sistema open-source que permite agentes de IA realizar producción de vídeo completa desde descripción en lenguaje natural. El sistema genera vídeos reales usando stock footage libre en lugar de solo animar imágenes estáticas.
bajada_en: OpenMontage launched, an open-source system enabling AI agents to perform complete video production from natural language descriptions. The system generates real videos using free stock footage instead of just animating stills.

title: British Police Built a Sprawling Crime-Prediction Machine. Some Results Couldn’t Be Trusted
summary: As UK police embrace the AI revolution, a WIRED investigation reveals the messy inside story of one region’s experiment with predictive analytics.
title_es: Investigación revela problemas de confianza en sistema de predicción de crimen con IA
bajada: Una investigación de WIRED descubrió que el sistema de análisis predictivo de crimen de policía británica presenta resultados no confiables. El caso ilustra los riesgos de desplegar sistemas de IA sin validación rigurosa en aplicaciones críticas.
bajada_en: A WIRED investigation found that British police's AI crime prediction system produces unreliable results. The case illustrates risks of deploying AI systems without rigorous validation in critical applications.

title: The Hitchhiker's Guide to Agentic AI: From Foundations to Systems
summary:
arXiv:2606.24937v1 Announce Type: new 
Abstract: The Hitchhiker's Guide to Agentic AI is a comprehensive practitioner's reference for building autonomous AI systems. The book covers the full stack from first principles to production deployment, organized around a central thesis: building great agentic systems requires understanding every layer of the pipeline, not just one. The book opens with the LLM substrate -- transformer architecture, GPU systems, training and fine-tuning (SFT,LoRA, MoE), model compression, and inference optimization -- treated as essential foundations rather than the primary focus. It then develops the alignment and reasoning layer: reinforcement learning from human feedback (RLHF), PPO, DPO and its variants, GRPO, reward modeling, and RL for large reasoning models including chain-of-thought and test-time scaling. The second half is devoted to agentic AI proper. Topics include agentic training and trajectory-based RL, retrieval-augmented generation (RAG and Agentic RAG), memory systems (in-context, external, episodic, and semantic), agent harness design and context management, and a taxonomy of agent design patterns. Inter-agent coordination is covered in depth: the Model Context Protocol (MCP), agent skills and tool use, the Agent-to-Agent (A2A) communication protocol, and multi-agent architectures spanning centralized, decentralized, and hierarchical topologies. The book concludes with agent development frameworks, agentic UI design, evaluation methodology for agentic tasks, and production deployment. Each chapter pairs rigorous theoretical foundations with implementation guidance, code examples, and references to the primary literature.
title_es: Publicado 'The Hitchhiker's Guide to Agentic AI': guía completa para sistemas autónomos
bajada: Se publicó un comprehensive guide sobre construcción de sistemas de IA agéntica que cubre desde fundamentos de transformers hasta deployment en producción. El recurso ofrece a developers una referencia práctica para el full stack de agentes de IA.
bajada_en: A comprehensive guide on building agentic AI systems was published, covering everything from transformer foundations to production deployment. The resource offers developers a practical reference for the full stack of AI agents.

title: RubyLLM: A Ruby framework for all major AI providers
title_es: RubyLLM: framework Ruby unificado para múltiples proveedores de IA
bajada: Se lanzó RubyLLM, un framework que unifica la integración con todos los principales proveedores de IA desde Ruby. La herramienta simplifica el desarrollo para developers de Ruby que buscan adoptar LLMs.
bajada_en: RubyLLM was launched, a framework that unifies integration with all major AI providers from Ruby. The tool simplifies development for Ruby developers looking to adopt LLMs.

title: AgentOdyssey: Open-Ended Long-Horizon Text Game Generation for Test-Time Continual Learning Agents
summary:
arXiv:2606.24893v1 Announce Type: new 
Abstract: For agents to learn continuously from interaction with the world at test time, they must be able to explore effectively, acquire new world knowledge and skills, retain relevant episodic experiences, and plan over long horizons. To evaluate these key abilities of test-time continual learning agents, we introduce AgentOdyssey, a novel evaluation framework that procedurally generates open-ended text games with rich entities, world dynamics, and long-horizon tasks. Critically, AgentOdyssey goes beyond the conventional machine learning assumption that learning does not occur at test time by placing agents in a continuous, long-horizon setting that interleaves learning and inference throughout deployment. We further propose a multifaceted evaluation methodology that measures not only game progress but also offers diagnostic tests on world knowledge acquisition, episodic memory, object and action exploration, action diversity, and model cost. We evaluate diverse agent paradigms in the generated games. Our experimental results reveal critical limits in agents' key abilities, as well as factors that influence their meaningful horizon. Although performance scales with stronger base models, even the top agent remains far below human performance, leaving substantial headroom for improvement. Among agent mechanisms, we find that short-term memory benefits multiple agent paradigms and is an important component of agent test-time training.
title_es: AgentOdyssey: framework para evaluar aprendizaje continuo en agentes
bajada: Investigadores presentaron AgentOdyssey, un framework de evaluación que genera juegos de texto procedurales para probar agentes con aprendizaje continuo en tiempo de inferencia. La herramienta revela limitaciones clave en capacidades de agentes actuales.
bajada_en: Researchers introduced AgentOdyssey, an evaluation framework generating procedural text games to test agents with test-time continual learning. The tool reveals critical limitations in current agent capabilities.

title: Facebook’s Creator Studio has been revived as an AI companion app
summary: Meta is bringing back the Facebook Creator Studio page manager, now "reimagined" as a standalone AI companion app. The new app aims to make it easier for creators to connect with their audiences and show them "exactly how to grow on Facebook," according to Meta's announcement. Meta's AI Creator Assistant is a central focus of […]
title_es: Meta relanza Creator Studio como aplicación compañera basada en IA
bajada: Meta reimaginó Facebook Creator Studio como una aplicación autónoma de IA que ayuda a creadores a crecer. La herramienta se enfoca en conectar creadores con audiencias mediante asistencia de IA integrada.
bajada_en: Meta reimagined Facebook Creator Studio as a standalone AI companion app to help creators grow. The tool focuses on connecting creators with audiences through integrated AI assistance.
